name: aura-glossy
description: Aura Glossy — vanilla HTML/CSS/JS fashion-editorial platform. This package.json exists ONLY so Netlify can resolve the firebase-admin dependency used by netlify/functions/. There is NO build step, NO framework, NO src/. Do not add other deps unless a Netlify Function genuinely needs them.

scripts._comment: no build — Netlify serves the static files at root as-is
